heading: Evaluation and reporting requirements
label: 11502 Evaluation and reporting requirements
text: Not later than the close of the 4th calendar year after the year in which the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development first designates areas as enterprise zones pursuant to the amendments made by section 834 of the Housing and Community Development Act of 1992, and at the close of each 4th calendar year thereafter, the Secretary shall prepare and submit to the Congress a report on the effects of such designation in accomplishing the purposes of this chapter.
notes: References in TextSection 834 of the Housing and Community Development Act of 1992, referred to in text, is , which amended this section and .section 834 of Pub. L. 102–550section 11501 of this title
Amendments1992— inserted “pursuant to the amendments made by section 834 of the Housing and Community Development Act of 1992” after “zones”.Pub. L. 102–550

Termination of Reporting RequirementsFor termination, effective , of provisions of this section relating to quadriennial submittal of report to Congress, see , as amended, set out as a note under , Money and Finance, and the 10th item on page 106 of House Document No. 103–7.May 15, 2000section 3003 of Pub. L. 104–66section 1113 of Title 31
